title: Margaret Atwood slams AI, says ‘it’s garbage in, garbage out’
description: Acclaimed Canadian author Margaret Atwood has described artificial intelligence as “garbage in, garbage out,” recalling that the only time she used an AI chatbot, it provided her with an incorrect answer.

title: Intelligent networks: How AI is transforming SASE, SD-WAN
description: The increasing amount of computing tasks and network activity generated by AI is changing the demands placed on enterprise networks.
